<!--
Use Conventional Commits for the PR title: type(scope?): short description
Examples: feat(upload): add CSV importer, fix(api): handle null user
Types: feat, fix, chore, docs, perf, refactor, test, ci
Keep title concise (<= 72 chars).
-->

## Summary

Describe in 1–2 lines the primary goal of this PR.

## What changed

- Brief bullets with the main changes (files, endpoints, migrations).

## Why

Briefly explain the motivation or benefit of this change.

## How to test

1. Start the app: `yarn dev`
2. Run tests: `yarn test`

## Notes / Breaking changes

- Migrations or manual steps required
- New/changed environment variables

## Checklist

- [ ] Automated tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, SETUP, etc.)
- [ ] Migration applied / instructions included (if applicable)
- [ ] Ready for review

## Related issues

- Fixes #

Required: PR title must follow the Conventional Commit format above.
